calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Successor Co Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Co Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Continued To Mar-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Co Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Continued To Feb-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Melnick for Frederick Euphrat.

Mr. Melnick stated that he did not think he could get a consent from Lisa Euphrat, that she was not cooperative, and that she gave him authorization to represent to the Court that she was not objecting to the petition. The matter was continued to Febraury 22, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If Ms. Euphrat does not sign the consent, Mr. Melnick is to file a declaration with a proof of service and mail a copy to her.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
